Risk: MiniBench-specific eligibility or payout rule is missed.
Mitigation: Owner verifies current rules before live batch and records deadlines.
Detection Signal: Conflicting rule text; missing eligibility badge/payout step.

Risk: Active question count/type mix differs from public page assumptions.
Mitigation: Authenticated fetch drives runtime scope; unsupported types fail closed.
Detection Signal: Fetched type not in supported set; eligible count differs from 59.

Risk: forecasting-tools beta update breaks interfaces or CDF behavior.
Mitigation: Pin 0.2.92 and run package contract tests before upgrades.
Detection Signal: Dependency drift; CDF golden test failure.

Risk: Submission times out after server accepted it, causing duplicate retry risk.
Mitigation: Idempotency key, block blind retry, refetch forecast history before retry.
Detection Signal: Timeout/no receipt; refetch shows new forecast or remains ambiguous.

Risk: Public SDK cannot provide complete response receipt.
Mitigation: Submission seam; record payload/exception/refetch; spike narrow response-capturing adapter.
Detection Signal: SDK returns None on successful post.

Risk: AskNews credentials/cost make primary retrieval unavailable.
Mitigation: Exa fallback; cost caps; raw replay cache.

Risk: Retrieval provides duplicated or stale evidence.
Mitigation: Canonical URL/content hashes, publication timestamps and freshness flags.
Detection Signal: Repeated content hashes; documents outside cutoff.

Risk: Model output passes JSON parsing but violates forecast semantics.
Mitigation: Strict Pydantic plus question-aware validators and one repair attempt.
Detection Signal: Option mismatch; probability sum; unordered percentiles.

Risk: Community prediction anchors the independent baseline.
Mitigation: Exclude CP from prompt; snapshot only after forecast generation.
Detection Signal: Research packet contains CP; model rationale cites community.

Risk: Attribution record contains hidden chain-of-thought or sensitive data.
Mitigation: Persist concise structured rationale; redact secrets; public-data review.
Detection Signal: Long unrestricted reasoning; token/key pattern scan hit.

Mitigation: SQLite only source of truth; deterministic exports with counts/hashes.

Risk: Numeric local score is incorrectly presented as Metaculus score.
Mitigation: Ingest platform score first; label any proxy explicitly.

Risk: Provider model name is invalid or silently routes to a different model.
Mitigation: Require explicit LiteLLM name; record returned model identifier; smoke test.

Risk: Human approval applies to a stale forecast after content changes.
Mitigation: Approval binds exact forecast/payload hash and expires on version change.
Detection Signal: Current hash differs from approval event.

Risk: Public repository leaks tokens or raw private data.
Mitigation: Env-only secrets, ignore generated data, secret scanning and review gate.
Detection Signal: Secret scanner alert; key-like string in git diff.

Risk: Limited Google Trends alpha access becomes a hidden dependency.
Mitigation: Keep Trends optional and disabled by default.

Risk: Model/retrieval spend scales unexpectedly across 59 questions.
Mitigation: Start limit=1, per-run USD cap, sequential processing and replay cache.
Detection Signal: Cost manager approaches cap; concurrent calls exceed plan.
